LanguageData.FCP_Faction_PRC.description: Founded on ideals of collectivism, harmony, and technological advancement, the People's Republic of China is a nation of bustling cities, rich cultural heritage, and a strong sense of community. Beneath the surface, however, growing censorship, state control, and military expansion shape daily life. Citizens enjoy rapid modernization, vibrant traditions, and national pride, even as the specter of international conflict looms ever closer.
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_PRC.label: People's Republic of China
